ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the training run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the training run */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training run */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used during training */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate applied during training */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the training run */,
  "total_epochs" INTEGER /* Total number of epochs planned for the training run */,
  "early_stopping" TEXT /* Indicates if early stopping was used and the criteria */,
  "validation_loss" REAL /* Validation loss for the best epoch */,
  "validation_accuracy" REAL /* Validation accuracy for the best epoch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used to build the model (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the model was modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., development, production, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training run this metric belongs to */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number for the training */,
  "loss_group_0" REAL /* Loss for group 0 */,
  "loss_group_1" REAL /* Loss for group 1 */,
  "loss_avg" REAL /* Average loss across groups */,
  "acc_group_0" REAL /* Accuracy for group 0 */,
  "acc_group_1" REAL /* Accuracy for group 1 */,
  "acc_avg" REAL /* Average accuracy across groups */,
  "validation_loss_group_0" REAL /* Validation loss for group 0 */,
  "validation_loss_group_1" REAL /* Validation loss for group 1 */,
  "validation_loss_avg" REAL /* Average validation loss across groups */,
  "validation_acc_group_0" REAL /* Validation accuracy for group 0 */,
  "validation_acc_group_1" REAL /* Validation accuracy for group 1 */,
  "validation_acc_avg" REAL /* Average validation accuracy across groups */,
  "custom_metric_1" REAL /* Custom metric 1 (e.g., F1 score) */,
  "custom_metric_2" REAL /* Custom metric 2 (e.g., precision) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training run this hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "alpha_group_0" REAL /* Alpha for group 0 */,
  "alpha_group_1" REAL /* Alpha for group 1 */,
  "count_group_0" INTEGER /* Count for group 0 */,
  "count_group_1" INTEGER /* Count for group 1 */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used (e.g., Adam, SGD) */,
  "momentum" REAL /* Momentum value if applicable */,
  "weight_decay" REAL /* Weight decay value if applicable */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate if applicable */,
  "batch_normalization" INTEGER /* Indicates if batch normalization is used */,
  "custom_hyperparam_1" REAL /* Custom hyperparameter 1 */,
  "custom_hyperparam_2" REAL /* Custom hyperparameter 2 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the training run */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the training run was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this model version */,
  "model_file_path" TEXT /* File path of the model version */,
  "model_file_size" REAL /* Size of the model file in MB */,
  "training_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training run used to create this model version */,
  "custom_notes" TEXT /* Custom notes about the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_training_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Storage location of the dataset (e.g., S3, local) */,
  "schema" TEXT /* Schema of the dataset */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the dataset was modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset usage record */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training run using the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being used */,
  "usage_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was accessed */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., training, validation, testing) */,
  "usage_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of dataset usage in seconds */,
  "custom_notes" TEXT /* Custom notes about the dataset usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_usage_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_usage_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)
